purpose: Source files to load into a future custom GPT/project knowledge base
status: Stage 20 Ansible automation v2 completed and committed; final README/demo packaging remains.
last_completed_stage: Stage 20 Ansible automation v2: group_vars, roles, deploy/check playbooks, PostgreSQL backup runbook, and audit-only network_audit were implemented and committed as 03ae409.
current_next_stage: Stage 21 Final README/demo packaging: final README, demo scripts, screenshots/dashboard export, Proxmox snapshots checklist. Firewall changes remain manual-review based; Ansible provides network/firewall audit only.

product.name: MISIS_Digital Student Support
product.storage: PostgreSQL database supportdesk on db:5432; tables tickets and ticket_events

runtime.app_backend: Docker container on app:8080 via docker compose
runtime.database_backups: pg_dump -Fc daily via backup-supportdesk.timer at 03:15 MSK, retention 7 days, sha256 checksums, latest.dump symlink, restore test verified
runtime.telegram_bot: Docker container on app:8090 metrics, long polling through outbound proxy, API client to supportdesk-api with source=telegram
runtime.bot_logs: /var/log/bot/support-bot.log shipped to Loki via Promtail job=support-bot
runtime.bot_observability: Prometheus job support-bot on 192.168.85.133:8090, SupportBotDown/BackendErrors/ErrorsDetected alerts, Grafana Telegram Bot Observability row with alerts/runtime/API dependency/latency/actions/logs panels
runtime.security_hardening: UFW active on web/app/log/monitor/db with default deny incoming/allow outgoing. db:5432 limited to app/admin; app:8080/8090 limited through DOCKER-USER to web/monitor/admin as appropriate; monitor UI limited to Windows/admin; Loki/exporters limited to required sources.
runtime.ansible_automation_v2: Commit 03ae409. Roles: common, node_exporter, app_compose_project, docker_compose_service, nginx_frontend, promtail, prometheus, postgres_exporter, postgres_backup. Playbooks include deploy_app/deploy_bot/deploy_nginx_frontend/deploy_promtail/deploy_prometheus/deploy_postgres_exporter/deploy_postgres_backup/run_db_backup/network_audit/check.
runtime.network_audit: playbooks/network_audit.yml creates docs/network-audit/latest reports. It is audit-only and does not apply firewall changes.

package_note: Compact source package: app.py and bot.py are exported separately as large runtime code files. Stage 20 adds 14_ansible_automation_v2_state.md as the dedicated Ansible v2 handoff. No .env/.env.bot secrets are included.
handoff_note: Use 14 for Ansible automation v2 details, 00 for roadmap, 08 for next checklist, 06 for exact current config snapshots, 03/04/05/11/13 for server state, app.py and bot.py for full code snapshots.

source_map.00_project_overview_and_roadmap.md: roadmap, completed stages, current progress, next stage
source_map.01_server_admin_state.md: admin/control node, Ansible, SSH, Git state
source_map.03_server_app_state.md: app server runtime: supportdesk-api container, support-bot container, app logs, API checks
source_map.04_server_log_state.md: Loki/Promtail/log streams, LogQL, app/bot/db log panels
source_map.05_network_state.md: IP map, ports, flows, Docker network, Telegram outbound proxy
source_map.06_config_files_current.md: current configs only: Ansible, Docker Compose, Dockerfiles, env templates, Nginx, Promtail, Prometheus, alert rules, backup timer, Grafana panel queries; no full app.py/bot.py duplication
source_map.08_next_steps_checklist.md: clean checklist of completed work and next tasks
source_map.10_interaction_guide.md: how to work in future chats, explanation style, latest handoff state
source_map.12_future_improvements_backlog.md: future ideas only; no current-state source of truth
source_map.13_server_db_state.md: PostgreSQL storage, tables, exporters, backups, restore state
source_map.bot.py: full Telegram support bot code snapshot
source_map.14_ansible_automation_v2_state.md: dedicated Stage 20 handoff: Ansible roles, playbooks, files, permission model, verification results, network audit policy
